name: Trail Side Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. In a large bowl, beat butter until creamy. Add peanut butter; mix well.
4. Stir in granulated sugar and brown sugar until combined.
5. Beat in eggs one at a time, then add milk and vanilla. Mix until smooth.
6. Gradually stir the flour mixture into the wet ingredients just until combined.
7. Fold in oats, raisins, and chocolate chips.
8. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased baking sheets.
9. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until golden brown. Let cool on wire racks.
